case_title: COLLEEN MORELLO et al VS. FREGILE JOSE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JOSE, FREGILE DELIZO, RICARDO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-05-2013.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORELLO, COLLEEN MORELLO, ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE, FREGILE DELIZO, RICARDO DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-26-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-11-2013

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-26-2013. JUN-26-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DAVID CARL ANDERSON.
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-24-2014. NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT WAS FILED ON 3/18/14. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON MAY-20-2014 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)

ARBITRATOR DAVID G. LEACH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-06-2013 THROUGH DEC-05-2013.
